### ARRL

**[The ARRL Solar Update](http://www.arrl.org/news/view/the-arrl-solar-update-23)**
> Solar activity continued at low levels with isolated C-classflaring. Regions 4381 and 4384 remained the primary drivers ofactivity. > A historic blizzard paralyzed much of the Northeast in late February, and amateur radio operators were on the air to help forecasters keep track of the storm’s impact.
